name: Ab Wheel Rollout
cues: Brace hard, roll out as far as you can hold a flat spine, pull back with abs.

name: Advanced Tuck Front Lever Hold
cues: Open the hips so the back is flat and horizontal, knees bent, depress scapulae, hold (seconds).

name: Advanced Tuck Planche
cues: Open the hips so the back is flat and parallel to floor, knees still bent, hold (seconds).

name: Archer Pull-up
cues: Pull to one hand while the other arm stays nearly straight along the bar; alternate sides.

name: Arnold Press
cues: Start palms facing you, rotate out as you press overhead, reverse on the way down.

name: Assisted Pull-up
cues: Set assist so last reps are hard; full range, elbows down.

name: Assisted (Pole/Door) Squat
cues: Hold a doorframe/pole for balance and assistance, squat to full depth, drive up.

name: 45-Degree Back Extension
cues: Hinge down with control, extend to neutral spine, squeeze glutes, don't hyperextend.

name: Band-Assisted Nordic Curl
cues: Anchor ankles, loop a band across the chest for assistance, lower under control, pull back up.

name: Band-Assisted Pull-up
cues: Loop a band on the bar and foot/knee, full hang to chin over bar; thinner band as you progress.

name: Band Chest Fly
cues: Anchor band behind you, sweep hands together with soft elbows.

name: Band Biceps Curl
cues: Stand on band, curl up with elbows pinned, slow eccentric for tension.

name: Band Face Pull
cues: Anchor band at face height, pull to forehead, elbows high, squeeze rear delts.

name: Band Glute Bridge
cues: Band above knees, drive hips up off floor, push knees out, squeeze glutes.

name: Band Good Morning
cues: Band over shoulders under feet, hinge at hips with flat back, drive hips through.

name: Band Lat Pulldown
cues: Anchor band overhead, kneel, pull elbows down to ribs.

name: Band Lateral Raise
cues: Stand on band, raise hands out to sides to shoulder height, slow eccentric.

name: Band Overhead Press
cues: Stand on band, press handles overhead, control the descent.

name: Band Romanian Deadlift
cues: Stand on band, hinge at hips, push hips back, feel hamstring tension.

name: Band Rear Delt Fly
cues: Anchor band in front at chest height, pull hands apart and back.

name: Band Seated Row
cues: Anchor band at foot level, sit tall, pull to navel, squeeze blades.

name: Band Triceps Pushdown
cues: Anchor band overhead, elbows pinned, push down to lockout.

name: Band Wrist Curl
cues: Stand on band, palms up, flex wrists up through full range.

name: Barbell Back Squat
cues: Brace, sit between hips, knees track over toes, depth to parallel or below.

name: Barbell Bench Press
cues: Tuck elbows ~45 degrees, touch lower chest, drive bar back over shoulders.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
cues: Upper back on bench, drive hips up to full extension, squeeze glutes hard, chin tucked.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
cues: Hinge ~45 degrees, flat back, pull bar to lower ribs, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Barbell Shrug
cues: Shrug straight up toward ears, brief squeeze, no rolling.

name: Barbell Wrist Curl
cues: Forearms on bench, palms up, let bar roll to fingertips, curl up.

name: Bayesian Cable Curl
cues: Cable behind body, arm back for a deep stretch, curl up with elbow fixed.

name: Belt Squat
cues: Load hangs from hips via belt, spine unloaded, sit deep, drive through heels.

name: Bench Dip
cues: Hands on a bench behind you, feet on floor, lower until shoulders are level, press up.

name: Bird Dog
cues: On hands and knees, extend opposite arm and leg, keep hips level, hold briefly.

name: Single-Leg Bodyweight Calf Raise
cues: One foot on stair edge, full stretch down, rise to full height, slow tempo.

name: Bodyweight Pull-up
cues: Use a doorway/portable bar; full hang to chin over bar.

name: Bodyweight Split Squat
cues: Split stance, drop straight down, slow tempo for added difficulty.

name: Box Pistol Squat
cues: One leg out front, sit back to a box on the working leg, stand without the other foot.

name: Bulgarian (Wide) Ring Dip
cues: Rings wide and turned out, lean forward into a deep stretch, press back to RTO support.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
cues: Rear foot on bench, drop straight down, drive through front heel.

name: Bodyweight Bulgarian Split Squat
cues: Rear foot on a box, drop straight down, drive through the front heel to stand.

name: Cable Crunch
cues: Kneel under rope, crunch ribs toward pelvis, round the spine, control up.

name: Cable Curl
cues: Low pulley, constant tension, curl with elbows fixed at sides.

name: Cable Fly
cues: Soft elbows, hug arms together, control the stretch.

name: Cable Rope Hammer Curl
cues: Rope on low pulley, neutral grip, curl with constant tension, thumbs up.

name: Cable Hip Abduction
cues: Ankle cuff on low pulley, sweep the working leg out and back, control return, glute medius.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
cues: Cable behind body, constant tension, raise to shoulder height with control.

name: Cable Pull-Through
cues: Face away from low pulley, rope between legs, hinge back then snap hips forward, squeeze.

name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
cues: Cross cables, sweep arms out and back, soft elbows, control return.

name: Cable Shrug
cues: Low pulley, constant tension, shrug to ears and control down.

name: Cable Triceps Pushdown
cues: Elbows pinned, push down to full lockout, control the return.

name: Captain's Chair Leg Raise
cues: Forearms on pads, posteriorly tilt pelvis, raise knees by curling hips up, control down.

name: Chest Press Machine
cues: Set seat so handles align with mid-chest, press without locking out hard.

name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
cues: Chest on incline bench, row dumbbells to hips, squeeze at top.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
cues: Hands ~shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, touch lower chest, press to lockout.

name: Conventional Barbell Deadlift
cues: Flat back, push the floor away, bar drags up shins, lock out tall, no rounding.

name: Decline Barbell Press
cues: Slight decline, touch lower chest, press up and back; biases lower pec.

name: Decline Weighted Crunch
cues: Decline bench, hold weight on chest, curl ribs to pelvis, full range, slow lower.

name: Deficit Wall Handstand Push-up
cues: Hands on parallettes against a wall, lower head below hand level for added range.

name: Diamond Push-up
cues: Hands form a diamond under chest, elbows tucked, press to lockout.

name: Parallel Bar Dip
cues: Stay upright for triceps bias, lower to ~90 degrees, press to lockout.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
cues: Lower dumbbells to chest level for a deep stretch, press up and slightly together.

name: Dumbbell Concentration Curl
cues: Elbow braced on inner thigh, curl with full supination, peak squeeze.

name: Flat Dumbbell Fly
cues: Soft elbows, wide arc to a deep stretch, hug dumbbells together at top.

name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl
cues: Neutral grip, curl up keeping thumbs up, hits brachioradialis.

name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
cues: Dumbbell across hips, upper back on bench, drive hips to full lockout.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
cues: Slight forward lean, lead with elbows, raise to shoulder height, no swing.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
cues: Both hands on one dumbbell, deep stretch behind head, extend fully.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
cues: Hinge at hips, dumbbells close to legs, stretch hamstrings, drive hips through.

name: Bent-Over Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
cues: Hinge over, sweep dumbbells out and back, lead with pinkies, no swing.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
cues: Arms hang at sides, shrug straight up, pause, lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Standing Calf Raise
cues: Balls of feet on a step, hold dumbbells, drop heels then rise to full height.

name: Dumbbell Wrist Curl
cues: Forearms on bench, let wrist roll open, curl up through full range.

name: Eccentric-Only Nordic Curl
cues: Anchor ankles, lower the torso as slowly as possible, then push back up with the hands.

name: Feet-Elevated Pike Push-up
cues: Feet on a box for a more vertical torso, lower head toward floor, press back up.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
cues: Elbows pinned at sides, curl up, control the negative, no swing.

name: EZ-Bar Skullcrusher
cues: Lower bar behind head for stretch, extend without flaring elbows.

name: Cable Face Pull
cues: Rope at face height, pull to forehead with elbows high, externally rotate at the end.

name: Foot-Supported L-Sit (Tuck Hold)
cues: Support on parallettes, keep feet lightly on the floor for assistance, hold (seconds).

name: Freestanding Handstand Push-up
cues: Free balance handstand, lower head to floor while balancing, press up to lockout.

name: Barbell Front Squat
cues: Bar on front delts, elbows high, sit straight down, stay upright, drive up.

name: Full Front Lever Hold
cues: Legs straight and together, body fully horizontal, straight arms, lats engaged, hold (seconds).

name: Full Front Lever Row
cues: Hold a full front lever, row your body up to the rings, keep the line rigid throughout.

name: Full L-Sit
cues: Support on parallettes, legs straight out parallel to floor, depress shoulders, hold (seconds).

name: Full Nordic Curl
cues: Anchor ankles, lower fully and pull yourself back up using only the hamstrings.

name: Full Pistol Squat
cues: One leg straight out front, sit to full depth on the working leg, drive up to stand.

name: Full Planche
cues: Legs straight and together, body flat and parallel to floor, hold (seconds).

name: Full Pull-up (Progression)
cues: Full dead hang, pull chin over bar, drive elbows down, control the descent.

name: Full Push-up (Planche Line)
cues: Rigid plank on the floor, lower chest to floor, elbows ~45 degrees, full lockout.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
cues: Hold dumbbell at chest, sit deep between knees, drive up tall.

name: Barbell Good Morning
cues: Bar on traps, soft knees, hinge with flat back to a hamstring stretch, drive hips through.

name: Hack Squat Machine
cues: Feet lower on platform for quad bias, descend deep, drive through whole foot.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
cues: Hang, posteriorly tilt pelvis, raise knees/legs by curling hips, control down.

name: Band Hip Abduction (Side-Lying)
cues: Band above knees, lift top leg up and back, control down, target glute medius.

name: Hollow Body Hold
cues: Lie flat, press low back into floor, lift shoulders and legs, hold the dish (seconds).

name: Incline Barbell Press
cues: Bench at ~30 degrees, touch upper chest, drive bar up over collarbone.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
cues: Bench ~60 degrees, arms hang back for stretch, curl without shoulder drift.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
cues: Bench ~30 degrees, deep stretch at bottom, press up and in.

name: Incline Push-up (Hands Elevated)
cues: Hands on a box/wall, rigid plank, lower chest to the surface; easiest push-up angle.

name: Decline Push-up (Feet Elevated)
cues: Feet on box/bed, hands on floor; emphasizes upper chest.

name: Inverted Row
cues: Bar at hip height, body rigid and angled, pull chest to bar, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: JM Press
cues: Lower bar toward upper chest/chin in a hybrid skullcrusher-press path, elbows forward.

name: Kneeling Ab Wheel Rollout (Progression)
cues: From knees, brace and roll out as far as you can hold a flat spine, pull back with abs.

name: Kroc Row (Heavy DB Row)
cues: Brace on bench, allow slight body English with a heavy dumbbell, row high, big range.

name: Half-Kneeling Landmine Press
cues: Half-kneel, press the bar end up and forward, full extension, control the return.

name: Landmine Row
cues: Straddle the bar, hinge over, row handle to chest, drive elbows back and squeeze.

name: Lat Pulldown
cues: Pull bar to upper chest, drive elbows down, control the stretch up top.

name: Leaning Cable Lateral Raise
cues: Lean away from the stack holding the upright, raise to shoulder height for a long stretch.

name: Leg Extension
cues: Pad on lower shin, extend to full lockout, squeeze, control down.

name: Leg Press
cues: Feet mid-platform, lower until knees near chest, don't lock out hard.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
cues: Balls of feet on platform, legs near straight, deep stretch then full press.

name: Low-to-High Cable Fly
cues: Pulleys low, sweep hands up and together to collarbone height; biases upper pec.

name: L-Sit Pull-up
cues: Hold legs straight out in an L while you pull; resist swing, chin over bar.

name: Lu Raise
cues: Raise light dumbbells out and overhead in a sweeping arc, pinkies up, control down.

name: Lying Leg Curl
cues: Pad on lower calves, curl heels to glutes, control the negative.

name: Lying Leg Raise
cues: Lie flat, raise legs while tilting pelvis up, lower slowly without arching.

name: Machine Hip Thrust
cues: Pad across hips, drive to full extension, hold squeeze at top.

name: Machine Lateral Raise
cues: Pads against outer arms, drive elbows out to shoulder height.

name: Machine Preacher Curl
cues: Arms on pad, full stretch at bottom, curl to peak, control without bouncing.

name: Meadows Row
cues: Stand perpendicular to landmine, overhand grip, row to hip with a big lat stretch.

name: Negative Pull-up
cues: Jump or step to the top, then lower as slowly as possible to a full hang.

name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldown
cues: Neutral V-handle, pull to upper chest, drive elbows down and back, control the stretch.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
cues: Anchor ankles, lower torso slowly under control, push back up with hands if needed.

name: One-Arm Pull-up
cues: From a one-arm hang, pull chin over bar with a single arm, minimize body rotation.

name: One-Arm Pull-up Negative
cues: Start at the top with one hand, lower as slowly as possible to a full one-arm hang.

name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
cues: Rope overhead, deep stretch behind head, extend fully, keep elbows narrow.

name: Standing Barbell Overhead Press
cues: Brace hard, press bar overhead, finish with bar over mid-foot, shrug at top.

name: Cable Pallof Press
cues: Stand side-on to the cable, press handle straight out, resist the rotation, hold, return.

name: Parallel Bar Dip (Progression)
cues: Support on parallel bars, lower to ~90 degrees, stay controlled, press to lockout.

name: Pec Deck Fly
cues: Slight elbow bend fixed, squeeze pads together, feel stretch at back.

name: Pendlay Row
cues: Torso parallel to floor, bar resets on floor each rep, explosive pull to lower chest.

name: Pike Push-up
cues: Pike at hips, hands on floor, lower the crown of head toward floor, press back up.

name: Front Plank
cues: Forearms down, posteriorly tilt pelvis, squeeze abs and glutes, hold (seconds).

name: Front Plank (Core Line)
cues: Forearms down, posteriorly tilt pelvis, squeeze abs and glutes, hold (seconds).

name: Preacher Curl
cues: Arms on pad, full stretch at bottom, curl up, don't bounce out of the hole.

name: Pseudo-Planche Push-up
cues: Hands by hips, lean shoulders far forward past the hands, protract scapulae, push up.

name: Barbell Push Press
cues: Short leg dip, drive bar overhead with leg momentum, lock out tall over mid-foot.

name: Push-up
cues: Rigid plank, lower chest to floor, elbows tucked ~45 degrees.

name: Rack Pull
cues: Bar at knee height in rack, flat back, pull to lockout and let traps hang heavy.

name: Reverse EZ-Bar Curl
cues: Overhand grip, elbows pinned, curl up keeping wrists firm; hits brachioradialis/extensors.

name: Reverse Hack Squat
cues: Face the pad, chest supported, sit deep with knees forward, drive through mid-foot.

name: Reverse Hyperextension
cues: Hips on a high bench, torso supported, swing legs up to extension, squeeze glutes, control down.

name: Dumbbell Reverse Lunge
cues: Step back, drop knee toward floor, drive through front heel to stand.

name: Reverse Pec Deck
cues: Chest on pad, sweep handles back and out, lead with pinkies, squeeze.

name: Ring Dip
cues: Dip on rings, keep them close, control the wobble, lower to depth, press to lockout.

name: Ring Dip with Rings Turned Out
cues: Dip then turn rings out (palms forward) at lockout for a hard support; control throughout.

name: Ring Support Hold
cues: Support at the top of the rings, arms locked, rings turned slightly out, hold (seconds).

name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
cues: Soft knees, push hips back, bar close, feel deep hamstring stretch, drive hips forward.

name: Seal Row
cues: Chest on a high bench, no torso English, row bar to bench underside, full squeeze.

name: Seated Cable Row
cues: Tall chest, pull handle to navel, retract shoulder blades, control stretch.

name: Seated Calf Raise
cues: Knees bent under pad to bias soleus, full stretch and contraction each rep.

name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
cues: Upright back support, press dumbbells up and slightly in, full stretch at bottom.

name: Seated Leg Curl
cues: Hips flexed for greater stretch, curl heels under, squeeze, control up.

name: Shoulder Press Machine
cues: Align handles with shoulders, press up smoothly, no harsh lockout.

name: Shrimp Squat
cues: Hold the rear foot behind you, drop the rear knee toward floor, drive up on one leg.

name: Single-Arm Cable Pushdown
cues: Reverse grip or neutral handle, elbow pinned, push to full lockout, control return.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
cues: Knee and hand on bench, flat back, row dumbbell to hip, control the stretch.

name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
cues: Upper back on bench, one foot planted, drive hips to full lockout, squeeze, level hips.

name: Single-Leg Dumbbell RDL
cues: Balance on one leg, hinge as the rear leg rises, flat back, drive hip to stand tall.

name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
cues: Knee bent ~90 with dumbbell on the thigh, ball of foot on a step, full stretch and squeeze.

name: Sissy Squat
cues: Heels up, knees travel forward as you lean back, keep hips extended, feel the quad stretch.

name: Smith Machine Standing Calf Raise
cues: Bar on traps, balls of feet on a block, legs straight, deep stretch then full plantarflexion.

name: Smith Machine Incline Press
cues: Bench ~30 degrees under the bar path, touch upper chest, press without locking hard.

name: Smith Machine Squat
cues: Feet slightly forward, descend deep, drive through whole foot, fixed bar path.

name: Spider Curl
cues: Chest on incline bench, arms hang straight down, curl up with a hard peak squeeze.

name: Split Squat (Progression)
cues: Split stance, drop straight down until rear knee nears floor, drive through front heel.

name: Standing Ab Wheel Rollout
cues: From standing, roll out and back to your feet without letting the hips sag; very advanced.

name: Standing Calf Raise
cues: Legs straight, drop heels for full stretch, rise to full plantarflexion, pause.

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
cues: Plant whole foot on box, drive through the heel to stand, control the descent.

name: Barbell Stiff-Leg Deadlift
cues: Minimal knee bend, hinge to a deep hamstring stretch, bar close, drive hips through.

name: Straddle Front Lever Hold
cues: Legs straight and split wide, body flat and horizontal, straight arms, hold (seconds).

name: Straddle Planche
cues: Legs straight and split wide, body flat and parallel, full protraction, hold (seconds).

name: Straight-Arm Cable Pulldown
cues: Arms nearly straight, sweep bar down to thighs in an arc, feel lats, no elbow bend.

name: Suspension Trainer Inverted Row
cues: Lean back on straps, rigid body, row chest to handles.

name: T-Bar Row
cues: Hinge with flat back, pull handles to chest, full squeeze.

name: Tate Press
cues: Lying, elbows flared, lower dumbbells to chest with plates turning in, extend up.

name: Trap-Bar Shrug
cues: Neutral handles at sides, shrug straight up, pause, no rolling.

name: Tuck Front Lever Row
cues: Knees tucked, body horizontal under the rings/bar, row to the hips, keep hips up.

name: Tuck L-Sit
cues: Support on parallettes, lift knees tucked to chest off the floor, depress shoulders, hold (seconds).

name: Tuck Planche
cues: Knees tucked to chest, lean shoulders forward past hands, protract hard, hold (seconds).

name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
cues: Step forward, drop rear knee toward floor, drive through front heel, alternate legs.

name: Wall Handstand Push-up
cues: Kick up to a wall handstand, lower head to floor under control, press to lockout.

name: Weighted Crunch
cues: Hold weight on chest, curl ribs toward pelvis, full crunch, slow lower.

name: Weighted Pull-up
cues: Full hang, drive elbows down and back, chest to bar.
